narrative:
N. Bloomfield Township has 1,339 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
